options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage <file> # The name of output file

options.name: -layer
options.description: The layer of OBS to be written ((layer), required)

options.name: -with_outer_shape
options.description: Default, command only save the OBS shape in inst boundary. If user saves OBS with this option, tool can save the OBS shape out of the inst boundary also.
